nasb.text: John testified saying, “I have seen the Spirit descending as a dove out of heaven, and He remained upon Him.

esv.text: And John bore witness: “I saw the Spirit descend from heaven like a dove, and it remained on him.

cnv.text: 約翰又作見證說：“我曾看見聖靈，好像鴿子從天上降下來，停留在他的身上。

ccb.text: 约翰又做见证说：“我看见圣灵好像鸽子一样从天降下，住在祂身上。

csbs.text: 约翰又见证说：“我看到圣灵好像鸽子从天上降临，停留在他身上。
